display_name: Betfair ITF + Challenger tennis match outcomes
notes:
Independently confirmed market inefficiency (Tennisnerd, smart-betting-club content):
sportsbooks under-model ITF and lower Challenger tier. Edge: head-to-head sparse,
surface adjustments, scheduling fatigue, coach changes, weather on outdoor clay.

sources_error.tennis_data:
not_implemented: adapter 'Tennis-Data' is not implemented yet.
  Source role: historical ATP/WTA/ITF match results + odds from http://www.tennis-data.co.uk/ or Jeff Sackmann's tennis-data repos (https://github.com/JeffSackmann).
  Implement quant/adapters/tennis-data.py with class signature `fetch(market, source_params) -> DataFrame`.
